title: AWS DynamoDB GetItem (JSON 1.0 protocol, X-Amz-Target routing)
description: DynamoDB uses the AWS JSON 1.0 protocol: every operation POSTs to "/" with the action named in the X-Amz-Target header (e.g. DynamoDB_20120810.GetItem), not in the URL path — so recipes for JSON-protocol services match on that header instead of the path. Point the SDK at Lyrebird via AWS_ENDPOINT_URL.
